_contract_version.description: Audit column — semver of the Bronze ODCS contract under which this row was written (matches metadata.version). Lets Silver and the DQ Gate detect contract drift without re-reading the YAML.
_contract_version.title: Contract Version

_correlation_id.description: Audit column — UUID linking the row to the APIM call.
_correlation_id.title: Correlation Id

_dq_status.description: Audit column — DQ Gate verdict set by internal data lineage.
_dq_status.title: Dq Status

_ingested_at_utc.description: Audit column — UTC timestamp when the row landed in Bronze.
_ingested_at_utc.title: Ingested At Utc

_raw_blob_path.description: Audit column — full ABFSS / S3 / queue URI of the raw payload as it landed in the source landing zone. Used for forensic replay and Purview lineage back to the raw blob. Supersedes the older _source_file audit column (kept for backward compatibility with ADR-002 v1 consumers); new ingest notebooks MUST set both to the same value when the source is file-shaped.
_raw_blob_path.title: Raw Blob Path

_source_file.description: Audit column — APIM push URI / Event Grid event id.
_source_file.title: Source File

_source_lane.description: Audit column — internal ingest lane (always "push" here).
_source_lane.title: Source Lane

active_recall_at_incident.description: Whether a VCA recall was active against the vehicle's model at the incident date. Source JSON key "liability_indicators.active_recall_at_incident".
active_recall_at_incident.title: Active Recall At Incident

ads_state.description: ADS engagement state at incident. Source JSON key "technical_data.ads_state".
ads_state.title: Ads State

asde_name.description: Legal name of the ASDE. Source JSON key "entities.asde.name".
asde_name.title: Asde Name

contributing_liability.description: Free-text statement of any contributing liability. Source JSON key "liability_indicators.contributing_liability".
contributing_liability.title: Contributing Liability

cyber_ads_telemetry_anomaly.description: Optional free-text description of any related ADS telemetry anomaly. Source JSON key "cyber_incident.ads_telemetry_anomaly".
cyber_ads_telemetry_anomaly.title: Cyber Ads Telemetry Anomaly

cyber_incident_category.description: Optional cyber-incident category (e.g. UN_R155_CSMS_VULNERABILITY). Source JSON key "cyber_incident.category".
cyber_incident_category.title: Cyber Incident Category

cyber_incident_reference.description: Optional UN R155 cyber incident reference (e.g. R155-INC-NVR-2025-001). Present only when the package includes a cyber_incident block. Source JSON key "cyber_incident.reference".
cyber_incident_reference.title: Cyber Incident Reference

cyber_incident_vector.description: Optional free-text description of the attack vector. Source JSON key "cyber_incident.vector".
cyber_incident_vector.title: Cyber Incident Vector

document_type.description: Fixed payload discriminator. Source JSON key "document_type".
document_type.title: Document Type

dt_references.description: Array of Data Tracker DT references the incident touches. Source JSON key "dt_references".
dt_references.title: Dt References

emergency_braking_pct.description: Emergency braking application percentage (0.0–100.0). Source JSON key "technical_data.emergency_braking_pct".
emergency_braking_pct.title: Emergency Braking Pct

failure_mode.description: ADS failure-mode tag (e.g. FAIL_PLANNER, FAIL_CYBER_AUTH, FAIL_PERCEPTION, FAIL_V2X). Source JSON key "technical_data.failure_mode".
failure_mode.title: Failure Mode

generated_date.description: ISO date the package was generated by the ASDE partner. Source JSON key "generated_date".
generated_date.title: Generated Date

incident_date.description: ISO date the incident occurred. Source JSON key "incident_date".
incident_date.title: Incident Date

incident_location.description: Free-text human-readable location of the incident. Source JSON key "incident_location".
incident_location.title: Incident Location

insurance_notification_required.description: Whether the package triggers a regulatory insurance notification. Source JSON key "liability_indicators.insurance_notification_required".
insurance_notification_required.title: Insurance Notification Required

investigation_reference.description: Statutory Inspector investigation reference (PK). The hero SI-INV-2025-0001 MUST round-trip verbatim. Source JSON key "investigation_reference".
investigation_reference.title: Investigation Reference

nuico_name.description: Legal name of the NUiCO. Source JSON key "entities.nuico.name".
nuico_name.title: Nuico Name

odd_road_type_compliance.description: Road-type ODD compliance verdict. Source JSON key "odd_assessment.road_type_compliance".
odd_road_type_compliance.title: Odd Road Type Compliance

odd_speed_compliance.description: Speed-band ODD compliance verdict. Source JSON key "odd_assessment.speed_compliance".
odd_speed_compliance.title: Odd Speed Compliance

odd_time_of_day_compliance.description: Time-of-day ODD compliance verdict. Source JSON key "odd_assessment.time_of_day_compliance".
odd_time_of_day_compliance.title: Odd Time Of Day Compliance

odd_weather_compliance.description: Weather ODD compliance verdict. Source JSON key "odd_assessment.weather_compliance".
odd_weather_compliance.title: Odd Weather Compliance

overall_odd_status.description: Overall ODD verdict. Source JSON key "odd_assessment.overall_odd_status".
overall_odd_status.title: Overall Odd Status

primary_liability.description: Free-text statement of primary liability attribution. Source JSON key "liability_indicators.primary_liability".
primary_liability.title: Primary Liability

raw_payload.description: Verbatim JSON payload as received over APIM, preserved for replay and forensic audit. Silver re-parses if the schema evolves.
raw_payload.title: Raw Payload

recall_reference.description: Optional VCA recall reference if active_recall_at_incident is true. The hero VCA-REC-2025-NVR-001 MUST appear at least once (SI-INV-2025-0001). Source JSON key "liability_indicators.recall_reference".
recall_reference.title: Recall Reference

schema_version.description: ASDE-partner package schema version (currently "1.0"). Source JSON key "schema_version".
schema_version.title: Schema Version

speed_kmh.description: Vehicle speed at incident in km/h. Source JSON key "technical_data.speed_kmh".
speed_kmh.title: Speed Kmh

vehicle_model_code.description: FK to bronze_dvla_type_approval.model_code. Source JSON key "vehicle.model_code".
vehicle_model_code.title: Vehicle Model Code

vehicle_model_name.description: Human-readable model name. Source JSON key "vehicle.model_name".
vehicle_model_name.title: Vehicle Model Name

vehicle_registration_mark.description: UK registration mark of the vehicle. Source JSON key "vehicle.registration_mark".
vehicle_registration_mark.title: Vehicle Registration Mark

vehicle_vin.description: Vehicle Identification Number — either a 17-char ISO-3779 VIN for sister packages or the hero UK plate "EXAMPLEPLATE01" / "an internal scenario" for SI-INV-2025-0001. Source JSON key "vehicle.vin".
vehicle_vin.title: Vehicle Vin
